The '''A-121 Plotter''' was a model of [[astrogation plotter]] designed and manufactured by [[Republic Sienar Systems/Legends|Republic Sienar Systems]] during the rule of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. By the time of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], modern [[Navigation computer/Legends|navigation computers]] had rendered the A-121 Plotter obsolete. If it was used in an emergency, calculating a [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] jump took five times as long and required a jury-rigged personal [[Computer/Legends|computer]] or [[Datapad/Legends|datapad]] to download the coordinates into the [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive's]] [[Hyperdrive motivator/Legends|motivator]].<ref name="PSG" />
